label: Xiaomi launches Hunter Alpha trillion parameter model and MiMo-V2 AI suite
label_zh: 小米推出 Hunter Alpha 萬億參數模型及 MiMo-V2 AI 套件

timeline.title: Xiaomi Debuts Trillion-Parameter MiMo-V2 Pro AI Model Unmasking Mysterious Hunter Alpha Identity
timeline.title_zh: 小米推出萬億參數 MiMo-V2 Pro AI 模型，揭開神秘的 Hunter Alpha 身分
timeline.sub_title: Xiaomi officially launches its MiMo-V2 AI suite, confirming the viral Hunter Alpha model as its flagship build designed to lead the global transition into an agent-oriented AI era.
timeline.sub_title_zh: 小米正式發布其 MiMo-V2 AI 套件，確認病毒式傳播的 Hunter Alpha 模型是其旗艦版本，旨在引領全球進入代理時代的 AI 轉型。
timeline.summary:
In a surprise midnight release on March 19, 2026, Xiaomi officially unveiled its MiMo-V2 AI suite, a high-performance foundation series that ends weeks of industry speculation regarding the origin of a mysterious "stealth" model. The company confirmed that the anonymous "Hunter Alpha" model, which had recently dominated usage leaderboards on the OpenRouter platform, is actually an internal test build of its flagship MiMo-V2-Pro. This [ref:7] strategic move signals Xiaomi’s aggressive transition from a hardware-centric giant into a leader of the emerging "agent era," where AI systems move beyond simple text generation to orchestrate complex, multi-step workflows with minimal human supervision.

The centerpiece of this announcement is the MiMo-V2-Pro, a massive model boasting more than one trillion total parameters. Utilizing [ref:3, 6, 8, 4] a sparse Mixture-of-Experts architecture, the model maintains high efficiency by keeping only 42 billion parameters active during any single inference pass—roughly three times the active scale of its predecessor, MiMo-V2-Flash. This design [ref:8] supports a colossal context window of one million tokens, enabling the system to process massive datasets, long-form documents, and extensive codebases without losing coherence. Early feedback indicates that the model's architecture is specifically optimized for "agentic" workloads, such as production engineering and autonomous task planning, rather than traditional chatbot interactions.

Benchmark results released alongside the launch place MiMo-V2-Pro in the top tier of global AI models. According to the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index, the model currently ranks eighth globally and second within China, trailing only the most advanced versions of U.S.-developed systems like Claude and GPT. Notably, MiMo-V2-Pro achieved a score of 49 on the intelligence index, significantly outperforming rivals in its price category. On specialized agent [ref:5] benchmarks like ClawEval and PinchBench, the model secured top-three rankings globally, matching the coding and reasoning capabilities of industry leaders while operating at a significantly lower cost per million tokens than its competitors.

Xiaomi is immediately integrating the MiMo-V2 suite across its sprawling ecosystem. The MiMo-V2-Pro is already powering enhanced search features in the Xiaomi Browser and is natively supported within Kingsoft’s WPS Office suite, where it assists with Word, Excel, and PDF management. Furthermore, the company [ref:3] introduced MiMo-V2-Omni—previously tested anonymously as "Healer Alpha"—a multimodal variant capable of unified understanding across text, image, audio, and video. To showcase these capabilities, Xiaomi launched "MiMo Claw," a demo platform allowing users to experience the model's task-solving ability through complex simulations. To court the developer community [ref:3], the company has opened API access and partnered with major agent frameworks like OpenClaw and Cline to offer extensive free trials.

The development of the MiMo-V2 series was led by Fuli Luo, a renowned researcher formerly associated with the disruptive DeepSeek project. Xiaomi CEO Lei Jun emphasized that the company's commitment to artificial intelligence is backed by a massive R&D and capital expenditure budget exceeding 160 billion yuan (approximately $23.3 billion) for the current year. This investment reflects a vision [ref:2] of "Physical AI," where advanced reasoning is integrated directly into Xiaomi’s hardware, from smartphones to electric vehicles like the SU7, ultimately creating a seamless intelligence layer for the modern consumer's digital and physical life.
timeline.summary_zh:
在2026年3月19日的意外午夜發布中，小米正式推出了其 MiMo-V2 AI 套件，這是一個高性能的基礎系列，結束了數週以來關於一個神秘「隱形」模型的行業猜測。該公司確認，最近在 OpenRouter 平台上佔據使用排行榜榜首的匿名「Hunter Alpha」模型，實際上是其旗艦 MiMo-V2-Pro 的內部測試版本。這一戰略舉動標誌著小米正積極從一個以硬件為中心的巨頭轉型為新興「代理時代」的領導者，在這個時代，AI 系統將超越簡單的文本生成，以最少的人工干預來協調複雜的多步驟工作流程。[ref:7]

此次發布的重點是 MiMo-V2-Pro，這是一個擁有超過一萬億個總參數的龐大模型。它採用稀疏專家混合架構，通過在任何單次推理過程中僅激活420億個參數來保持高效率——大約是其前代 MiMo-V2-Flash 的活躍規模的三倍。這種設計支持一個龐大的百萬級 token 上下文窗口，使系統能夠處理海量數據集、長篇文檔和廣泛的代碼庫，而不會失去連貫性。早期反饋表明，該模型的架構特別針對「代理式」工作負載進行了優化，例如生產工程和自主任務規劃，而不是傳統的聊天機器人互動。[ref:3, 6, 8, 4]

與發布一起公布的基準測試結果將 MiMo-V2-Pro 置於全球 AI 模型的前列。根據人工智能分析指數（Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index），該模型目前在全球排名第八，在中國排名第二，僅次於美國開發的系統（如 Claude 和 GPT）最先進的版本。值得注意的是，MiMo-V2-Pro 在智商指數上獲得了49分，在同類價格產品中顯著優於競爭對手。在像 ClawEval 和 PinchBench 這樣的專用代理基準測試中，該模型在全球排名前三，其編碼和推理能力與行業領導者相當，同時運營成本也遠低於其競爭對手。

小米正立即將 MiMo-V2 套件整合到其龐大的生態系統中。MiMo-V2-Pro 已為小米瀏覽器增強的搜索功能提供動力，並原生支持金山 WPS Office 套件，協助進行 Word、Excel 和 PDF 管理。此外，該公司推出了 MiMo-V2-Omni——此前匿名測試為「Healer Alpha」——這是一個能夠在文本、圖像、音頻和視頻之間實現統一理解的多模態變體。為了展示這些能力，小米推出了「MiMo Claw」，一個演示平台，讓用戶能夠通過複雜的模擬體驗模型的任務解決能力。為了爭取開發者社區，該公司已開放 API 訪問，並與 OpenClaw 和 Cline 等主要代理框架合作，提供廣泛的免費試用。

MiMo-V2 系列的開發由 Fuli Luo 領導，他是一位著名的研究員，曾與顛覆性的 DeepSeek 項目有關聯。小米首席執行官雷軍強調，公司對人工智能的承諾得到了本年度超過1600億元人民幣（約合233億美元）的巨額研發和資本支出預算的支撐。這項投資反映了一種「物理人工智能」的願景，即先進的推理能力直接整合到小米的硬件中，從智能手機到 SU7 等電動汽車，最終為現代消費者的數字和物理生活創造一個無縫的智能層。
